content_body: The best trip ever. Shopping in Downtown Blue Ridge was so enjoyable. We went down there every day. There is something for everyone down there. "Sweet Treats" ice cream is the best we've ever had (anywhere)! Fly fishing on the Toccoa was quite the challenge (and cold!) but very relaxing and fun. We love such a beautiful place and have wonderful memories of an awesome vacation.
title: Shopping and Fly Fishing In North Georgia
